name: android-sdk-libsparse-utils
title: android-sdk-libsparse-utils
description:
Android sparse image creation tool
Command line tools to create sparse images for usage with Android devices.
Includes simg2img, img2simg, simg2simg, simg_dump and append2simg tools.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use append2simg because Android sparse image creation tool.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use append2simg as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `append2simg [options] [args]` as documented upstream for append2simg.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair append2simg with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `append2simg --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
